metadata.name: Manage Utility Accounts for Vacant Unit

description: A unit is vacant between tenants. The property manager needs to put the electric utility account in the owner's name.

nodes.task_description: Identify the vacant unit and the local electric utility provider.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the property address and the correct utility company.

nodes.task_description: Contact the utility company to stop the previous tenant's service and start new service under the property owner's name.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully initiates a service transfer.

nodes.task_description: Log the utility account information in the property's file for future reference.

expected_outcome.value: Agent records the new account number for the property.
